creator: freebsd@soulrebel.in-berlin.de
text:
Hi Max,

I solved ports/130502 differently by letting the .desktop look for different 
versions of kdesu or gksu.

I attached a udiff that includes these changes aswell as my other changes 
(maintainer-address) to ports-mgmt/kports.


Greetings
Hannes


Am Sonntag, 18. Januar 2009 14:14:07 schrieb Max Brazhnikov:
> Hi Hannes,
>
> shar should be used for new ports only. For existing ports submitting patch
> in unified diff format is preferred.
> Could you also look at kports related PR: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-
> pr.cgi?pr=ports/130502
>
> Cheers,
> Max
